sections.paragraph:
Original: אתא אתה

Transliteration: 'âthâh 'âthâ'

Phonetic: aw-thaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to come, arrive
    1. (Peal) to come
    2. (Aphel) to bring
    3. (Hophal) to be brought
  2. used in the NT in the phrase " maranatha" - " Lord come"

Origin: corresponding to H857

TWOT entry: 2618

Part(s) of speech: Verb
